architecturalFeatures.en: Small Southern Fujian temple — far smaller than the Sidian Wumiao, but retaining the unpretentious layout of early temples; a striking contrast in scale to its official successor.
architecturalFeatures.zh: 小型閩南廟宇，規模遠小於祀典武廟，但保留了早期廟宇的質樸格局，與祀典武廟形成鮮明的規模對比。

en: Note: Ancestral origin temple of Sidian Wumiao; the root of Guan Di worship in Tainan
zh: 特色：祀典武廟「開基祖廟」，台南關帝信仰源頭

historicalContext.en: Built during the Zheng Kingdom era, predating the Sidian Wumiao; the earliest root temple of Guan Di worship in Tainan. Later ceded its official ritual status to the newly built official temple for political reasons.
historicalContext.zh: 建於明鄭時期，歷史早於祀典武廟，為台南關帝信仰最早的根源廟宇，後因政治因素祀典地位讓渡給新建的官方武廟。

modernUse.en: Still maintains daily worship; preserves its historical status as a founding temple and is an important historic site for studying the development of Tainan's temple culture.
modernUse.zh: 現仍維持日常祭祀，保存開基廟宇的歷史地位，為研究台南廟宇發展史的重要史蹟。

description.en: Contrast with Sidian Wumiao: Photograph the entrances of both temples separately for side-by-side comparison of their scale difference — embodying the historical relationship between 'founding' and 'official' temples.
description.zh: 與祀典武廟對比構思：分別拍攝兩廟入口，並排觀察規模差異，體現「開基」與「祀典」的歷史關係。

description.en: Historical wear close-up: Shoot worn marks on doors, stone pillars, or walls to sense the accumulation of time.
description.zh: 古舊痕跡特寫：拍攝廟門、石柱或牆面上的歷史刻痕，感受歲月積澱。

description.en: Temple panorama in alley: Shoot the whole temple from the far end of the alley; capture the spatial tension between the small temple and the densely packed residences.
description.zh: 巷弄中的廟宇全景：從巷弄遠端拍攝廟宇全景，呈現小廟與高密度民居並存的空間張力。

whyItMatters.en: The founding Guan Di temple in Tainan — the ancestral origin of the grander Sidian Wumiao. Its irreplaceable role in Tainan's Guan Di worship system makes it essential for understanding the inheritance relationships among Tainan's temples.
whyItMatters.zh: 台南關帝信仰的發源廟宇，為後來規模宏大的祀典武廟之「開基祖廟」，在台南關帝信仰系統中地位不可取代，是理解台南廟宇傳承關係的關鍵場所。
